title: eriosema distinctum
intro: Eriosema distinctum, also known as the "Distinkt Bushpea", is a plant species belonging to the Fabaceae family, native to tropical Africa. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal effects. The health benefits of Eriosema distinctum include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to act as an antiseptic and antimicrobial agent. In herbal preparations, Eriosema distinctum is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures that can be used to treat a range of health issues.
